common.title: Maetry
common.description: Salon management software and beauty booking marketplace

booking.metaDescription: Book a beauty appointment with a Maetry salon in just a few steps
booking.headline: Online booking
booking.subtitle: Choose a service, a specialist and a time that works for you
booking.serviceHint: Browse the salon service menu without signing in.
booking.timeHint: All times are shown in the salon time zone.
booking.timeEmptyHint: Try another day or choose a different service.
booking.detailsHint: The salon will use your phone number only to confirm the appointment.

booking.fieldPhoneHelper: Your number is used only to confirm the booking.
booking.serviceEmptyTitle: No services are available right now
booking.serviceEmptyHint: This booking link is active, but the salon has not published bookable services yet.
booking.masterNotRequired: The salon will assign the right specialist if needed.
booking.successBookingHint: The booking is created. We are loading the final confirmation details.
booking.successSubtitle: Add the appointment to your wallet so the details stay close at hand.

walletShare.toastApple: Open this page on iPhone or iPad to add the pass to Apple Wallet
walletShare.toastGoogle: Open this page on an Android device to add the pass to Google Wallet

errors.loadProcedures: We couldn't load the salon services. Please refresh the page.
errors.loadSlots: We couldn't find available times for this service.
errors.createAppointment: We couldn't create the booking. Please try again later.

errors.contractGapCatalog: The salon catalog endpoint appears to require customer authorization. Public booking cannot fully work until the backend exposes this data for public links.

errors.validationSlot: Choose an available time slot before continuing.

loading.salon: Loading salon details and service catalog...

warnings.partialSalonData: Some salon details are temporarily unavailable. Booking can still continue with the data we already have.
warnings.missingPublicSalonContract: Some salon endpoints still behave like authorized customer endpoints. The UI keeps the public flow running where possible, but backend public access still needs to be fixed.

hero.subtitle: one ecosystem for salon operations and client booking
hero.description: Maetry helps salons manage bookings and helps clients discover and book beauty services.

about.title: Tools for salon operations and client booking, built in one ecosystem
about.description: Maetry gives salon teams a cleaner way to run bookings, schedules and client communication while giving clients a simpler path to discover and book services.

julia.name: Julia
julia.text: Maetry gives me a clear view of bookings, repeat clients and the daily workload. The salon feels easier to manage because the information is finally in one place.

nikita.name: Nikita
nikita.text: Online booking through Maetry removes friction for clients and brings in demand without constant manual coordination.

sofia.name: Sofia
sofia.text: We track feedback and daily performance inside one workflow, which helps the team keep service quality high.

irina.name: Irina
irina.text: I spend less time piecing numbers together and more time deciding which services deserve attention and how to grow revenue.

features.subtitle: platform overview
features.title: Core tools for booking, team coordination and client communication

management.title: Schedule management
management.description: Set working hours, avoid overlaps and keep every specialist's availability up to date.

notifications.title: Client reminders
notifications.description: Reduce no-shows with automatic reminders and more consistent communication.

onlineBooking.title: Online booking
onlineBooking.description: Let clients book without calling and give the team more time for service instead of manual confirmations.

pricing.subtitle: pricing
pricing.title: Simple pricing that grows with the team
pricing.description: Start with a clear base plan, then estimate the monthly total as your team expands.

calculator.title: How many team members do you have?
calculator.note: The estimate assumes the base price includes one team member.

q1.question: What can salon teams manage in Maetry?
q1.answer: Maetry supports online booking, schedules, reminders, client history and day-to-day salon operations in one place.

q2.question: Can I work in another salon and manage my own?
q2.answer: Yes. If your account has access to multiple workspaces, you can switch between them.

q3.question: How do I invite a team member?
q3.answer: Open the salon workspace, create an invitation and send the link to the employee.

q4.question: Can I create a booking for a client who does not use the app?
q4.answer: Yes. Create the appointment without selecting an existing client first, then share the generated link if needed.

q5.question: Can I share a booking link on social media?
q5.answer: Yes. Salons can use booking links in social media, messengers and other client touchpoints.

prefooter.title: Sign in
prefooter.subtitle: Start running your salon with less manual work
prefooter.description: We help teams onboard quickly, migrate essential data and set up the service around real salon workflows.

ambassador.title: Bring salons to Maetry and earn recurring partner revenue
ambassador.subtitle: For consultants, agencies and industry partners who already work with salon owners. Refer salons to Maetry and earn 50% of subscription payments during the first 6 months.
ambassador.aboutDescription: Maetry helps salons centralize bookings, schedules, client history and reminders. Use the points below to explain the operational value clearly.
ambassador.readyToPartner: Work with Maetry as a partner
ambassador.partnerDescription: If you already advise, market to or onboard salon owners, send us a request. We will reply with terms, materials and the referral workflow.
ambassador.offerValue: 50% of subscription revenue during the first 6 months for every referred salon
ambassador.benefit1Value: A practical system for bookings, schedules, reminders and smoother team coordination
ambassador.benefit2Value: Clear economics and recurring revenue from active referred salons
ambassador.ctaNote: Tell us how you work with salons and we will send the next steps.

email.subject: I want to join the Maetry partner program
email.body: Hello! I work with salon owners and would like to join the Maetry partner program. Please send me the partnership terms and next steps.

ambassador.gridDescription: Each module turns a salon pain point into a concrete Maetry outcome you can use in outreach, audits and demos.
ambassador.gridHint: Use these points in partner conversations with salon owners and managers

appointments.title: Bookings
problems: Appointments live in notebooks, chats or personal calendars
Free time is hard to see at a glance
Administrators spend too much time distributing bookings

schedule.title: Work schedules
problems: Clients call to ask who is working
Shift changes create confusion
Manual schedule updates take too much time

services.title: Service catalog
problems: The service list lives in memory or notes
Prices and responsible specialists are unclear
Clients arrive unprepared
solutions: Custom pricing and descriptions by specialist

clients.title: Client base
problems: Client history is not stored in one place
It is hard to spot inactive clients
Contacts depend on memory or personal phones
solutions: Add clients manually or through invitations
Keep visit and service history in one profile
benefits: Stronger base for outreach and marketing

employees.title: Team management
problems: Limited visibility into specialist workload
Roles and pay structure are not transparent
Access is hard to manage
solutions: Client and booking tracking by specialist

salon.title: Salon profile
problems: Clients struggle to find contacts or location
Salon information lives in different places
New clients have no clear discovery path
solutions: Salon profile with brand, contacts and description
benefits: More visibility for new client acquisition

attraction.title: Client acquisition
problems: It is hard to turn social traffic into bookings
Calling the salon is inconvenient for many clients
solutions: Booking links for social profiles and websites

workspaces.title: Multiple locations
problems: Specialists work across locations and lose track of appointments
Owners switch between disconnected systems
solutions: Switch between salons from one account

support.title: Support and onboarding
problems: Teams worry about switching systems
Nobody wants to hunt for instructions
New staff need help ramping up
